transcript:
Buyer: Your renewal quote came in 40% higher. We can't accept that.
Vendor: Usage has more than doubled — the new tier reflects actual consumption.
Buyer: Understood, but we'd need to evaluate alternatives at that price.
Vendor: We could offer a multi-year commit at the old rate plus 15%.
Buyer: Two-year commit at plus 12% and we have a deal.
Vendor: I need to clear that with finance. I'll come back tomorrow.
Buyer: Works. I'll have legal start reviewing the contract template in parallel.
